'''Takitals''' were ritual battles conducted by various [[Amani/Legends|Amanin]] tribes on [[Maridun/Legends|Maridun]], organized in areas sacred to the Amanin. Their goal was to create a peace between the tribes.

[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Ziering]] and his army unknowingly became involved in a [[Battle of Maridun (0 ABY)|Takital]] when they trespassed into such an area. They gained respect from an Amanin tribe, when the force held out during two grueling days of combat.
